  "findings": [
    "Conductors crossing the bus gutter space, violating wire-bending space and gutter fill requirements.",
    "Potential physical damage to conductor insulation from proximity to live busbars and sharp edges."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Route conductors neatly along the sides of the panelboard enclosure using the designated wiring gutters.",
    "Secure and bundle conductors where appropriate, ensuring they do not cross over or obstruct the main busbars.",
    "Maintain required wire-bending space at terminals in accordance with NEC tables."
  ],
  "rationale": "Conductors crossing the bus gutter space violate NEC Article 408.3(A)(3) and 408.55, which require orderly wiring and adequate bending space. This practice restricts heat dissipation, risks insulation damage against live parts, and complicates future maintenance. Since the work is in-progress, it must be corrected before final inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 408.3(A)(3)",
    "NEC Article 408.55",
    "NEC Article 312.6",
    "NEC Article 110.26"
  ]
}
